variants.label: no_title_intent_confusion_gate
variants.note: Disable ambiguity-aware display downscaling and keep full title-intent rescue.

variants.label: no_latest_version_rerank
variants.note: Keep other display rules, but force latest-version preference off.

variants.label: no_title_intent_adjustment
variants.note: Disable title-intent and query-plan role adjustment, keep coverage and latest-version.

variants.label: no_structured_kp_role_evidence_adjustment
variants.note: Disable structured KP-role evidence adjustment only.

variants.label: no_lexical_title_intent_adjustment
variants.note: Disable lexical title-intent rules while keeping structured title signals.

variants.label: no_structured_query_plan_doc_role_adjustment
variants.note: Disable structured query-plan doc-role alignment only.

variants.label: no_lexical_title_type_adjustment
variants.note: Disable coarse title-type lexical rules only.

variants.label: no_lexical_scenario_title_adjustment
variants.note: Disable scenario-specific lexical title rules only.

variants.label: no_ai_school_entity_title_adjustment
variants.note: Disable AI-school entity title adjustment only.

variants.label: no_doctoral_theme_title_adjustment
variants.note: Disable doctoral residual title fallback only.

variants.label: no_tuimian_theme_title_adjustment
variants.note: Disable tuimian residual title fallback only.

variants.label: no_summer_camp_theme_title_adjustment
variants.note: Disable summer-camp residual title fallback only.

variants.label: no_transfer_theme_title_adjustment
variants.note: Disable transfer residual title fallback only.

variants.label: no_specialized_title_adjustment
variants.note: Disable theme-specific and compressed-keyword title specialization together.

variants.label: all_display_rules_off
variants.note: Disable phase, title-intent, coverage, and latest-version display rerank.
